extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming an oil stain on the exterior of their package.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a cardboard package with a large, dark, oily-looking stain on its surface.

result.user_claim: Customer: There is a dark oily mark on my package. | Agent: Are you reporting water damage or oil stain? | Customer: Oil stain. | Agent: Any contents issue? | Customer: No, package oil stain only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed box with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed box with visible stain. Supporting images: img_1.
